architecturalDecisions.choice: beastmode <phase> <slug> — phases are top-level commands, run subcommand dropped
Create-once at first phase, persist through all, squash-merge+remove at release
Skills are worktree-blind — CLI sets cwd, skills never reference worktree paths
Skills own checkpoint commits; CLI owns branch creation and squash-merge
CLI must match worktree-manager.md derivation (lowercase, hyphens, strip non-alnum)
Spawns claude CLI with cwd (not --worktree flag), inherited stdio
Per-feature worktrees <epic>-<feature>, merge-coordinator merges to epic branch
Delete Justfile, hooks/worktree-create.sh, WorktreeCreate from hooks.json
